fundamentals.name: Snowflake Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Snowflake Inc. provides a cloud-based data platform for various organizations in the United States and internationally. The company's platform includes artificial intelligence (AI) Data Cloud, which enables customers to consolidate data into a single source of truth to drive meaningful business insights, build data applications, and share data and data products, as well as applies AI for solving business problems. It serves financial services, advertising, media and entertainment, retail and consumer goods, healthcare and life sciences, manufacturing, technology, telecom, travel and hospitality, and government and defense industries, as well as the public sector. the company has a collaboration with OpenAI, L.L.C. for the development of AI solutions for joint enterprise customers that deliver tangible return on investment. The company was formerly known as Snowflake Computing, Inc. and changed its name to Snowflake Inc. in April 2019. Snowflake Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Menlo Park, California.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and FCF, but currently unprofitable and trading at a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter (Q1 2026-01-31) reported EPS of $0.32 vs estimate $0.27, a beat. Next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 30.1% YoY, with analyst estimates for current Q and FY at 33.3% and 43.5% respectively.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.59B indicates strong cash generation.
Majority of 48 analysts have a 'buy' consensus with a mean target of $229.14.
negatives: Operating margin of -33.2% and profit margin of -28.4% indicate unprofitability.
Return on equity of -53.9% and return on assets of -9.9% are poor.
Forward P/E of 73.05 and Price/Sales of 13.10 suggest a high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 142.46 indicates significant leverage.

news.paragraph: Snowflake is on the cusp of its Q1 earnings report, with analysts revising forecasts ahead of the call and some suggesting current share price weakness could present an opportunity. The company's last reported quarter beat expectations, and analysts are projecting strong growth for the current quarter and fiscal year. The upcoming earnings release is the primary focus, with market sentiment appearing cautiously optimistic.
